metadata.source_context_score_engine: V6.3 Continuous Exposure Context Score Audit
metadata.source_protection_validation_engine: V6.4 Protection Score Robustness & Conditional Validation
metadata.source_decision_engine: V6.2 Adaptive Exposure Decision Layer Design Audit
metadata.purpose: Validate fixed participation/protection score axes as a research-only environment map.

evidence.reason: V6.5 audits fixed V6.3 scores only; no mapper, exposure, ETF, weight, or trade change.

summary.key_read: The two-axis map is a research-only environment map built from fixed V6.3 participation/protection buckets.

axis_definition.high_participation: participation_bucket == high from V6.3 fixed score_bucket
axis_definition.high_protection: protection_bucket == high from V6.3 fixed score_bucket

social_financing_growth.source: data/macro/social_financing_growth.json
